angle: Six units and every booking, message and turnover still routes through you. Hububb runs the day-to-day across every unit so the portfolio scales past your head.
brief: Marketer static batch, concept 5 of 8 (HUB_JUL_CLA_BOTTLENECK), POV that-is-me confession. Pillar: proof-trust third path, funnel: convert, angle: bottleneck. Audience: scaling operator, 5-6 units, London (Claire). Spotlight: real operator photo, home office, coffee and the portfolio numbers, calm not firefighting. Two-tone headline, white CTA pill, price proof chip as clean type per the marketer note (no fake earnings composites). Paid-ad candidate.

copy.headline: Add units
copy.subhead: Bookings, guests, cleaning and pricing across every unit. A bigger portfolio never means a longer to-do list.
copy.proof: £35 a month per unit, everything included.

social.primaryText:
Six units. Two cleaners. A handyman. And every booking, message and turnover still routes through you. That is the ceiling: the operation only scales as far as you can.

Hububb is the autonomous AI host that runs the day-to-day across every unit: bookings synced, guests answered automatically, cleaning booked the moment a guest checks out, nightly pricing tuned to demand. It handles 90%+ of the operation, so the work stops waiting on you being awake.

This is not handing the keys to a management company. You keep the ownership, the reviews, the Superhost status, and the control. Connect a single listing first, run it in parallel with how you work today, and move more over only when it is earning. £35 a month per unit, everything included.
